div1.entryFree: Blur, vb., to stain, to disfigure: thy issue --'d with nameless bastardy, Lucr. 522. never yet did base dishonour b. our name, H6B IV, 1, 39. such an act that --s the grace and blush of modesty, Hml. III, 4, 41. time hath nothing --'d those lines of favour which then he wore, Cymb. IV, 2, 104.
